name: CRISPR edit outcome: FORECasT predicted vs measured indel profiles (TVD/JSD)
leakage_caveat: K562 is FORECasT's primary TRAINING cell line and these oligos are FORECasT's own library; the train/test split for these specific guides is not verified against a primary source. So this is an IN-DISTRIBUTION distribution-agreement measurement, NOT a held-out accuracy claim.
citation: Allen F, Crepaldi L, Alsinet C, et al. (2018) Predicting the mutations generated by repair of Cas9-induced double-strand breaks. Nat Biotechnol 37:64-72. Processed mutational profiles: figshare 10.6084/m9.figshare.7312067.v2 (CC BY 4.0).; Allen F, Crepaldi L, Alsinet C, et al. (2018) Predicting the mutations generated by repair of Cas9-induced double-strand breaks. Nat Biotechnol 37:64-72. gRNA-target design library (self_target_oligos_details_with_pam_details.csv) from the Code Ocean capsule 10.24433/CO.6bc7bcae-d736-475b-bae5-00ca0562d401.
interpretation: FORECasT (Allen 2018) predicted indel distributions vs the measured profiles on K562 (800x, LV7A, DPI7): median TVD 0.546 (IQR 0.493-0.595), median JSD 0.385, over n=150 FORWARD-strand guides (>= 100 edited reads each). TVD is the fraction of outcome mass misallocated on average; lower is better. Scored FORWARD-strand design records only (the predictor's indelgentarget rejects the REVERSE records as-provided; strand is orthogonal to model accuracy). Leakage UNKNOWN: K562 is FORECasT's primary TRAINING cell line and these oligos are FORECasT's own library; the train/test split for these specific guides is not verified against a primary source. So this is an IN-DISTRIBUTION distribution-agreement measurement, NOT a held-out accuracy claim.
